# IMMOHRTAL

> IMMOHRTAL is the rap project of Dillon Mohr, a 28-year-old chief marketing
> officer from Erie, Pennsylvania, now based in Pittsburgh. His debut album,
> Dance With The Delusional, is an 11-track lyrical rap record in the Mac
> Miller lineage.

## Facts

- Artist name: IMMOHRTAL
- Real name: Dillon Mohr
- Hometown: Erie, Pennsylvania (the 814)
- Based in: Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania
- Day role: Chief Marketing Officer
- Primary influence: Mac Miller (the album Faces, 2014)
- Genre: lyrical rap, storytelling rap, underground rap
- Debut album: Dance With The Delusional (11 tracks)
- Features: King Keev (814 Blood, On My Way), Ted Moon (Dance with the Delusional)
- Booking / press: immohrtal.llc@gmail.com

## The story

Dillon Mohr spent years building a marketing career while rap stayed the thing
underneath — the notebooks, the voice memos, the late-night lines. Mac Miller
is the reason he wanted to rap at all. Dance With The Delusional is built from
two lives meeting in one room: the marketer who understands attention and the
rapper who treats every verse like a sport. The campaign line: if not now, when.

- Official video (Picking Up My Notepad): https://immohrtal-site.netlify.app/video.html
- Blog: https://immohrtal-site.netlify.app/blog.html
- Contact / booking: https://immohrtal-site.netlify.app/contact.html
